scripts.checkdeps: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); let out; try { out = execSync('pnpm ls -g --depth=0', { encoding: 'utf8' }); } catch (e) { out = (e.stdout || '') + (e.stderr || ''); } const missing = ['concurrently', 'live-server'].filter(p => !out.includes(p + '@')); if (missing.length) { console.error('Missing required global pnpm module(s): ' + missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1); }"
